action_boundary: May the care operator activate the medication or treatment workflow now? Focus: anticoagulant hold reversal.
communication_boundary: Clinical activation cannot proceed from tone, urgency, patient familiarity, or old chart context; current order authority must close the exact boundary.

records.content: Policy rule for Clinical medication / treatment activation controls: execution may proceed only when current source records close the exact requested action boundary. Communication text cannot override source-control records.
